plugins.name: csharp-lsp
plugins.description: C# LSP via Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.LanguageServer (Roslyn LSP from the VS Code C# extension). Workspace = ${PWIZ_LSP_DIR:-${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/pwiz/pwiz_tools} (PWIZ_LSP_DIR is the full pwiz_tools path; set it to pick a checkout in multi-checkout layouts); handles .NET Framework 4.7.2 and modern .NET.
